title: papaver rhoeas var. chelidonioides
intro: Papaver rhoeas var. chelidonioides, also known as the Corn Poppy or Flanders Poppy, is a variety of the annual flowering plant Papaver rhoeas. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects, making it useful for treating a range of health issues. The health benefits of Papaver rhoeas var. chelidonioides include reducing pain and inflammation, and it has been traditionally used to treat conditions such as digestive issues and respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of Papaver rhoeas var. chelidonioides can be found in the form of dried flowers, capsules, or tinctures, and are often used in traditional medicine and natural remedies.
